what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-assets image, specifically a gold info icon, holding metadata such as id, address, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, versioning, and links.
observations: YAML-frontmatter ledger entry for an image asset
id and address follow the icons/Info_Gold and image://design-assets/icons/Info_Gold scheme
alt text in the version block is empty
version is 1 with a single versions entry
standouts: width and height are 0 for an image asset
no links or relationships are recorded
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for a structured ledger record
Follows a channel/path/id/address naming convention for design-assets
Maintains a versions array with per-version metadata
concerns: Zero width and height suggest missing or uncomputed image metadata
Empty alt text may limit accessibility or searchability
No links/edges connect this asset to screens, components, or other icons
Only one version exists, so there is no history to compare
notes: A metadata stub for a gold info icon asset that has a blob reference but lacks computed dimensions, alt text, and relationships.
questions: Why are the image dimensions recorded as 0?
What does the 'dragnet' source indicate about how this asset was ingested?
Is the empty alt text intentional or awaiting review?
Which UI components or pages are expected to use this icon?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose appears to be cataloging a design-assets icon; the actual content is a metadata-only record with placeholder dimensions and no relationships, so it is a partial catalog entry.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to register and version a gold info icon in the design-assets channel so it can be addressed, retrieved, and audited later.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record for the Info_Gold icon, including its blob reference, channel classification, MIME type, creation timestamp, and authoring session.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata record for the design-assets image asset 'icons/Info_Gold', referencing a PNG blob with zero dimensions and empty alt text.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and version a gold info icon in the design-assets channel for retrieval and provenance tracking.
